arts.ttl: Graham Potter cancelled West Ham transfer – Didn’t fancy striker despite Hammers reaching agreement
arts.sum: Graham Potter cancelled the arrival of striker Andre Silva at West Ham United, deciding against a move for the RB Leipzig man this month. That’s according to BILD journalist Christian Falk, who reports that it was Potter who ultimately decided against the move. West Ham have been desperately scouring the market for a new striker The post Graham Potter cancelled West Ham transfer – Didn’t fancy striker despite Hammers reaching agreement appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: David Ornstein shares major update on Christopher Nkunku's Chelsea future amid Man Utd and Bayern Munich interest
Nkunku set to stay at Chelsea amid Bayern links
arts.sum: Despite interest from Bayern Munich among others, Christopher Nkunku is reportedly set to remain at Chelsea beyond the transfer deadline.

arts.ttl: Opportunistic club hovering over Chelsea player – Hoping for move elsewhere to fail
arts.sum: There’s a claim in the Turkish media that Galatasaray could look to come in for Chelsea forward Joao Felix after signing Alvaro Morata at the weekend. The Portugal international could move in this window after finding his chances limited since arriving from Atletico Madrid in the summer. arts.ttl: Ben Chilwell to Crystal Palace: Contract details revealed, how much of the left-back's wages will Chelsea pay?
arts.sum: Chelsea will still contribute to a significant portion of Ben Chilwell's wages once his loan move to Crystal Palace is complete, according to a report.
